title: [kimi-review] 2357144: [SEVERITY: low] The comment references `parse_data:794` — a
description:
Commit: 235714407
Message: docs(meshtastic): clarify has_portnum contract in adapter (l5ym)

Finding: [SEVERITY: low] The comment references `parse_data:794` — a hard-coded line number in documentation is fragile and will silently become wrong as the referenced file evolves. It also omits the file path, so `parse_data` is ambiguous (which file? which module?). Prefer referencing the function by name only, or the file path plus function name.
